Local-first desktop AI client for user-owned OpenAI-compatible providers.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo check`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] macOS build smoke tested
- [ ] Windows build smoke tested, or marked pending

## Known Limitations

- Unsigned builds may show OS security warnings.
- macOS notarization is not configured.
- Windows signing is not configured.
- Auto-update is not configured.
